title: notifications-in-app — subprocessors
description: None. The in-app transport uses our own broadcast layer (Laravel Reverb / Pusher-compatible driver hosted on our infra); no third-party vendor sees the notification content. If the tenant's deployment swaps in Pusher / Ably / Soketi as the broadcaster, that vendor becomes a subprocessor — update this file per deployment. Marker file with an explanation.
notes: The default deployment ships Laravel Reverb on our own K8s cluster. Reverb is transport (not a subprocessor) because we control it.
Tenancy on the self-hosted plan may opt into Pusher / Ably; when they do, the deployment-specific config should override subprocessors.json to declare that vendor.
